case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1266 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 17.06.2025 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for the Respondents/University Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Same was the situation since 24.12.2024 and lastly the matter was fixed on 09.05.2025 where the petitioner remained unrepresented and it was adjourned in the interest of justice. The continuous absence of the petitioner and her Counsel prima facie indicates that she is not interested to pursue the matter. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
